audience: Owners and operations leaders in established Sydney service businesses
problem: Routine lead qualification work is spread across people and systems, creating checking, chasing and double handling.
single_message: Collect useful context before a person spends time on the conversation
supporting_points: Map the real workflow before choosing technology
Automate repeated movement and rule-based actions
Keep exceptions, relationships and accountability human
angle: Collect useful context before a person spends time on the conversation
headline_options: Collect useful context before a person spends time on the conversation

caption_hook_options: Where does lead qualification get stuck?
The hidden work around lead qualification
selected_hook: The hidden work around lead qualification
visual_concept: A time returned that makes the repeated steps and the human decision point visible
image_generation_prompt: Premium editorial still life illustrating lead qualification in an Australian service business, earthy green and warm neutral palette, useful operational artefact, no people unless essential
article_outline: A practical way to improve it
promotion_hypothesis: The lead qualification problem is recognisable, the hook is direct and the visual can explain a practical improvement without hype.
